title: lastrea robertiana
intro: Lastrea robertiana, also known as the Robert's Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lastrea robertiana include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Lastrea robertiana can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
